en_title: 'I Don't Want to See Any of Them': James Bond Ex-Casting Director Who Picked Timothy Dalton, Pierce Brosnan and Daniel Craig Shoots Down Current 007 Frontrunners
cn_title: 《詹姆斯·邦德》前选角导演否决现任候选：他们太有名了
subtitle: 邦德必须是谜
opus_summary: 前007选角导演Debbie McWilliams直言雅各布·艾洛蒂等热门人选名气太大，不适合出演邦德，强调演员应凭空出现并保持神秘。

paragraphs.en: James Bond's former casting director has discounted the current crop of actors in the running to replace Daniel Craig as 007, suggesting they're already too well known.
paragraphs.cn: 詹姆斯·邦德的前选角导演否决了当前一批角逐接替丹尼尔·克雷格成为007的演员，认为他们早已名声太大。

paragraphs.en: Frankenstein's Jacob Elordi, Babygirl's Harris Dickinson and Fantastic Beasts' Callum Turner are currently seen as the most likely candidates to become the next James Bond , with auditions now finally underway.
paragraphs.cn: 目前看来，《弗兰肯斯坦》的Jacob Elordi、《Babygirl》的Harris Dickinson和《神奇动物在哪里》的Callum Turner是最有可能成为下一任詹姆斯·邦德的人选，试镜工作终于启动。

paragraphs.en: In previous years, these auditions would be led by Debbie McWilliams, who cast Craig and his two predecessors, Pierce Brosnan and Timothy Dalton. But with McWilliams now retired and Amazon in charge of the franchise , the decision now rests elsewhere. However, speaking to The Independent , McWilliams still had thoughts on who should and shouldn't be the next James Bond — and believes it needs to be an actor has comes "completely out of the blue."
paragraphs.cn: 过去几年，这些试镜由Debbie McWilliams主导，她曾选定了克雷格及其两位前任皮尔斯·布鲁斯南和蒂莫西·道尔顿。但如今McWilliams已退休，亚马逊掌控了该系列，决定权已转到别处。不过，在接受《独立报》采访时，McWilliams仍然对谁适合或不适合饰演下一任詹姆斯·邦德发表了看法——她认为这个角色需要一位「完全凭空出现」的演员。

paragraphs.en: "It is absolutely essential that he retains a total enigma," McWilliams said. "I don't want to see any of [the main frontrunners] as Bond because we now know so much about them," she added, reflecting that all have established acting careers.
paragraphs.cn: 「他保持完全神秘是绝对必要的，」McWilliams说，「我不想看到任何[热门领跑者]饰演邦德，因为我们现在对他们了解太多了，」她补充道，并指出他们都已拥有成熟的演艺事业。

paragraphs.en: "We want to know as little about them personally as possible, because that's what spies are," McWilliams continued. "We don't need to know where he goes shopping or who his parents are, or where he lives. We never want to see him at home. And a vital element of the whole thing is his job description. He's licensed to kill, and we have to believe that he can do that. If you don't, then you’ve lost the audience."
paragraphs.cn: 「我们想要尽可能少地了解他们的个人情况，因为间谍就是如此，」McWilliams继续说，「我们不需要知道他去哪里购物，他父母是谁，或者他住在哪里。我们绝不想看到他在家里的样子。整个角色的关键要素之一是他的职业描述。他拥有杀人执照，我们必须相信他真的能做到。如果做不到，那你就失去了观众。」

paragraphs.en: When McWilliams cast Dalton and Brosnan, neither were "particularly well known," she said. Craig, meanwhile, was just starting to find mainstream fame after starring in British gangster film Layer Cake. "Daniel had had a career in independent films and a fairly colourful romantic life beforehand, but he wasn't a household name, and that helps enormously," McWilliams reflected.
paragraphs.cn: McWilliams表示，当年她选定道尔顿和布鲁斯南时，两人「都不是特别出名」。而克雷格则是在主演英国黑帮片《夹心蛋糕》后刚刚开始获得主流名声。「丹尼尔之前演过不少独立电影，感情生活也相当丰富多彩，但他并不是家喻户晓的名字，这点帮助极大，」McWilliams回忆道。

paragraphs.en: While Elordi, Dickinson and Turner are popular fan picks, McWilliams pointed back to the initial backlash against Craig being cast as a blond James Bond — before his debut in Casino Royale silenced most of his haters.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然Elordi、Dickinson和Turner是粉丝们热衷的人选，但McWilliams回想起了当初Craig被选为金发詹姆斯·邦德时受到的强烈反对——直到他在《皇家赌场》中的首秀才让大多数质疑者闭嘴。

paragraphs.en: "He was such an unpopular choice," McWilliams said. "Nobody supported it. Not the studio. Not the director... I have a theory that this totally spurred him on. He thought, 'I'm going to show you bastards,' and he did. And everybody went, 'Oh my God, isn't he wonderful?' So don't ask the people who they want, because they won't know."
paragraphs.cn: McWilliams说道：「他当时极不受欢迎，没有任何人支持他。片方不支持，导演也不支持……我觉得这反而彻底激励了他。他心想，『我要让你们这帮家伙见识见识』，然后他就做到了。结果所有人都说，『天哪，他简直太棒了！』所以别去问大家想要谁，因为他们自己也不知道。」

paragraphs.en: Recent months have seen longterm favorite Idris Elba rule himself out of the running, saying it was never "realistic" that he'd win the part . You can also check out what Spider-Man star Tom Holland had to say about rumors about his potential casting last summer. James Bond 26 will be the first 007 film from Amazon MGM Studios and new producers David Heyman and Amy Pascal , who took over from Bond franchise producers Barbara Broccoli and Michael G. Wilson . Dune director Denis Villeneuve has signed on to helm the movie .
paragraphs.cn: 最近几个月，长期热门人选Idris Elba宣布退出竞争，称自己获得这个角色从来都不「现实」。你还可以去看看《蜘蛛侠》明星Tom Holland去年夏天对选角传闻的回应。《詹姆斯·邦德26》将是Amazon MGM Studios和新制片人David Heyman与Amy Pascal接手后的首部007电影，他们接替了邦德系列制片人Barbara Broccoli和 迈克尔G. Wilson。《沙丘》导演Denis Villeneuve已签约执导该片。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑，可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。
